arts.ttl: West Ham unchanged for Leicester visit
arts.sum: The 28-year-old England international leads the Hammers again at London Stadium, seeking to add to the three goals and two assists he has registered in seven career Premier League appearances against tonight’s opponents. Head Coach Graham Potter has named an unchanged starting XI from the West Ham United team who beat Arsenal on Saturday for Thursday’s Premier League home fixture with Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v West Ham as Facundo Buonanotte returns amid three changes
arts.sum: City (4-2-3-1): Hermansen; Justin, Faes, Vestergaard, Kristiansen; Ndidi, Soumare; Buonanotte, El Khannouss, De Cordova-Reid; Vardy. Buonanotte had only started three of van Nistelrooy’s 13 Premier League matches in charge before Thursday night but offered glimmers of hope off the bench during the dismal defeat to Brentford on Friday and earns his first start in a month and a half.

arts.ttl: West Ham United v Leicester City: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Top scorers | Read today’s Football Daily No surprise that West Ham are unchanged after that win at the Emirates. Ruud van Nisetlrooy makes three changes to the Leicester side that was thrashed by Brentford last Friday: James Justin, Jannik Vestergaard and Facundo Buonanotte replace Woyo Coulibaly, Caleb Okoli and Jordan Ayew. West Ham (3-5-2) Areola; Todibo, Kilman, Cresswell; Wan-Bissaka, Soucek, Ward-Prowse, Alvarez, Scarles; Bowen, Kudus. Substitutes: Fabianski, Soler, Mavropanos, Luis Guilherme, Ings, Rodriguez, Emerson Palmieri, Ferguson, Irving. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: West Ham: Aaron Wan-Bissaka the latest player thriving away from Manchester United chaos
arts.sum: Right-back is shining for the Hammers and has established himself as a key player under Graham Potter

arts.ttl: West Ham v Leicester: All you need to know
arts.sum: West Ham United host Leicester City at London Stadium this Thursday night, as the Hammers look to build on their impressive win at Arsenal and address their recent struggles at home. West Ham currently sit 16th in the Premier League with 30 points, following their 1-0 victory over Arsenal at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: “Makes sense” | West Ham interested in England defender Harwood-Bellis
arts.sum: West Ham United could make a move for Southampton defender Taylor Harwood-Bellis in the summer as Graham Potter looks for defensive reinforcements. The Hammers have had a poor season all-round, but the defence is where we’ve struggled the most and at least one new defender is needed in the transfer window. In the first half... arts.ttl: Graham Potter Wants 'Incredible' Star, His Agent is 'Close' to West Ham
arts.sum: West Ham United are among several Premier League clubs eyeing a summer move for Southampton defender Taylor Harwood-Bellis.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy takes harsher stance over Mads Hermansen and Boubakary Soumare incident
arts.sum: Leicester City players must put on a united front and cannot be seen publicly at loggerheads, manager Ruud van Nistelrooy urged. Straight after the game, van Nistelrooy said it was not a problem, as it showed the players care.

arts.ttl: President will ‘do everything possible’ to sign West Ham player – Manager keen on transfer
arts.sum: Guido Rodríguez was linked with a move away from West Ham United in January, but no deal took shape. The Hammers took Rodríguez on a free transfer last summer and he played over 1,000 minutes from 20 matches. He lost prominence during Julen Lopetegui’s final weeks at the club. arts.ttl: West Ham vs Leicester: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: West Ham host Leicester in the Premier League on Thursday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.
